instruction: The greet function returns 'Hello NAME' but the test expects 'Hello, NAME!' (a comma after Hello and an exclamation mark at the end). Fix the returned string so greet('Sam') == 'Hello, Sam!'.

files.test_greet.py:
from greet import greet


def test_greet():
    assert greet("Sam") == "Hello, Sam!"
    assert greet("Ada") == "Hello, Ada!"
